items.title: BuildKit Brief — Gaming & Tech — July 10, 2026
items.subtitle: What changed this cycle across the games worth your time. Every claim sourced.

newsletter.subject: BuildKit Brief — Gaming & Tech — July 10, 2026 — 18 updates
newsletter.preview: Path of Exile 2 Build Showcase: Slowmaxing Chronomancer by TuskDeluxe · New Transfigured Skills in Path of Exile: Curse of the Allflame · Counter-Strike 2 Update · Minor Update - 07-09-2026

sections.blurb: Your main ARPG. League state + balance patches move your build.

items.headline: Path of Exile 2 Build Showcase: Slowmaxing Chronomancer by TuskDeluxe
items.summary: This Chronomancer build by TuskDeluxe is built around the Auspex and its Grueling Madness aura, which slowmaxes enemies up to 100% at maximum stacks. Embrace the slow side of..things below: Big thank you to TuskDeluxe for putting this build together. For more information, refer to their video here.

items.headline: 0.5.4b Patch Notes
items.summary: 0.5.4b Patch NotesBoss Improvements Removed a majority of the stun and freeze immunity windows from all versions of the Tor Gul, the Defiler boss fight. Improved the Minion Phase in the Tasgul, Swallower of Light fight.
bullets: Removed a majority of the stun and freeze immunity windows from all versions of the Tor Gul, the Defiler boss fight.
Improved the Minion Phase in the Tasgul, Swallower of Light fight.
Fixed a bug where It That Was Esh could sometimes fail to advance phases properly.
Fixed a bug where the Arbiter of Divinity could rarely drop loot in an unreachable location.
Defeating the Arbiter of Divinity now re-enables the exit elevator.
Extended the time the player has to get into the first Flame Seed during the combo skill that begins with the Large Laser in the Arbiter of Ash boss fight.

items.headline: Path of Exile 2 at gamescom 2026
items.summary: Path of Exile 2 will once again be heading to gamescom in Cologne, Germany. Play a special demo available exclusively at the event, snap some photos with our eerie display, and pick up exclusive merchandise. We'll be sharing more details closer to the event, and we hope to see you there!

sections.blurb: PoE1 events + league cycle (separate game from PoE2).

items.headline: New Transfigured Skills in Path of Exile: Curse of the Allflame
items.summary: For the past few Path of Exile expansions, we've continued expanding the roster of Transfigured Skills, bringing unique alternate versions to gems that didn't yet have one. Each offers a fresh way to play a familiar skill, opening up new build possibilities.

items.headline: Path of Exile: Curse of the Allflame Releases on July 24 PDT
items.summary: Beneath the deep, an ancient curse awaits. GGG Live GGG Live will begin at 1PM on July 16th PDT at twitch.tv/pathofexile. During the livestream you'll learn all about the 3.29 expansion for Path of Exile, its challenge league and other content.

items.headline: League check: Ancestors is live
items.summary: Current PoE1 challenge league: **Ancestors**. Started Jun 25, 2026. Ends in ~6 days (Jul 16) — plan your next character.

source.name: Path of Exile — Official leagues API (GGG)

provenance.source_name: Path of Exile — Official leagues API (GGG)
provenance.note: Live from GGG's public leagues endpoint.

items.headline: Play the Return of the Ancestors Event on June 25th PDT
items.summary: The Ancestors have heard your call. The beloved Trial of the Ancestors mechanics return to Path of Exile in a three-week event starting June 25 (PDT)! Harness the power of Phrecian Ascendancy classes and new Tattoos to challenge the legendary Karui chieftains.
bullets: Start Date: 3PM June 25th PDT
End Date: 3PM July 16th PDT
Based on: Mirage
Standard, Hardcore, Standard Solo Self-Found and Hardcore Solo Self-Found versions available. The event also has a Ruthless mode available which uses the sam…
This event is not voided. Items and characters will transfer to parent leagues at the end of the event. Upon migration, your characters’ Ascendancy points wi…

sections.blurb: Updates, map/economy changes, and the pro circuit.

items.headline: Counter-Strike 2 Update
items.summary: Removed map-wide minimum one point of damage from new C4 explosions. Fixed a case where new C4 damage was calculated incorrectly near boundaries to other map areas. New C4 explosions now apply more force to dropped weapons. Adjusted the "Sniper Ahead" sticker visibility when scraped.
bullets: Removed map-wide minimum one point of damage from new C4 explosions.
Fixed a case where new C4 damage was calculated incorrectly near boundaries to other map areas.
New C4 explosions now apply more force to dropped weapons.
Adjusted the "Sniper Ahead" sticker visibility when scraped.
Fixed a case where season medals were missing their gold tint on one of the bars.
Fixed a case where the scoreboard wouldn't update while open.

items.headline: Season 5, Armory, and More
items.summary: Reporting for Active Duty Cache has officially arrived, and replaces Overpass in the active duty map pool. Put your hard-earned strats to the test and rise through the Premier ranks in CS2's newest battlefield. Get out of there, it's gonna blow!

sections.blurb: Valve's hero shooter — patch cadence + hero balance.

items.headline: Minor Update - 07-09-2026
items.summary: - Urn Runner sprint bonus reduced from +2m to 0 (trailing bonus reduced from +7m to +5m)- Urn Runner move speed bonus reduced from +3.5m to +2m- Urn Runner Stamina Recovery increased from +15% to +25%- Urn talking frequency increased from every 8s to every 6s- Urn talking sound distance increased…

items.headline: Minor Update - 07-01-2026
items.summary: - Shiv: Alt Fire ammo cost reduced from 5 to 4- Shiv: Weapon now has fixed pellet spread- Shiv: Slice and Dice is now back to doing spirit damage and reducing Spirit Resistance from enemies- Shiv: Slice and Dice damage increased from 60 to 75- Shiv: Killing Blow T3 reduced from +10% Enemy Health…

items.headline: Minor Update - 06-30-2026
items.summary: - King of the Hill objective has been rethemed and renamed to "Unstable Rift"- Unstable Rift no longer requires an Urn delivery to trigger the start of the event. It now has a variable start time of +/- 1 minute. There is a global announcement 25s before it spawns.

sections.blurb: Early-access deckbuilder — balance + RNG fixes matter.

items.headline: Beta Patch Notes - v0.108.0
items.summary: For all you beta testers who have been chomping at the bit for a new patch to chew on... here it is! Today's beta patch brings a ton of fixes, balance changes, some UX additions, a BIG batch of new multiplayer cards, and new art additions--including some animations for the latest boss, Aeonglass!
bullets: End-of-turn Orb passives now trigger before Doom
This means that, if a player would die to self-Doom (ex. from Neurosurge card) but also has an Orb with an end-of-turn passive that would kill the last remai…
Buffed Torch Head Amalgam: increased damage at Ascension 9
Weak Tackle damage increased from 14(15) → 14(16)
Tackle damage increased from 18(19) → 18(22)
Changed Regen Potion: its healing effect now triggers before Doom, preventing the player from dying to self-Doom in certain situations

items.headline: Slay the Spire 2 gets 15 powerful new multiplayer cards, while making life easier the first time you install a mod
items.summary: Slay the Spire 2 has received a bunch of potent new cards specifically for co-operative multiplayer. They span all five of the game's classes, from the aloof and stargazing Regent to the venomous and underhand Silent (Silent! My beloved, etc).

source.name: Slay the Spire 2 — Rock, Paper, Shotgun

provenance.source_name: Slay the Spire 2 — Rock, Paper, Shotgun
provenance.note: Press coverage of a real update.

items.headline: The Neowsletter - June 2026
items.summary: Hey Slayers, it's time for the June Neowsletter! In this issue we're covering a couple of big roadmap items we've checked off our list as of yesterday's main branch patch and answering some of your recent questions. Let's dive in... Dev Update The first feature we want to highlight is the Bestiary.

sections.blurb: Grand strategy — dev diaries + version betas.

items.headline: HOI IV - Open Beta Summer Edition™
items.summary: Generals! Greetings from sunny Stockholm to everyone, I’m Batya, Game Director for Hearts of Iron. The summer period is upon us and I wanted to share some information with you all. Unlike the norm of armies planning summer offensives, game developers actually do the opposite and take time off.
bullets: Right-click the game in your library
Select Properties from the drop-down menu
Select Game Versions & Betas
Select the beta branch called open_beta
Battalion Adjusters now scale with the Equipment and Manpower status of the Sub-Unit. E.g. Super Heavy Artillery with Siege Artillery Sub-Doctrine no longer…
Added Essential (Equipment) Blocks for the following units: Heavy Weapons Company and Motorized Heavy Weapons Company, Light Flame Tank, Medium Flame Tank, H…

items.headline: HOI IV Dev Corner | Questions about Civil Wars
items.summary: Hello all! First of all I want to be extra clear - we are not talking about a rework for civil wars. What I am after is understanding how you’ve enjoyed content with civil wars, what feels good, what doesn’t feel good. So!
bullets: How do you feel when you start progressing down the focus tree?
Do you try to rush down the civil war path, do you do common branches?
What do you do with your military? (the starting nation)
What do you do with industry? (the starting nation)
What annoys you with this type of playthrough?
What is it that makes the civil war feel rewarding/worth doing?

items.headline: Thunder at our Gates | Patch 1.19.2
items.summary: Generals! Today marks the last pre-summer patch with fixes and tweaks to Thunder At Our Gates. After this the team will have limited presence in the office for the summer period.
bullets: Right click the game in Steam
Go to Properties, then Game Versions & Betas
Select 1.19.1
Default Public Version will use the latest public build, in this case 1.19.2
Expeditionary Leader trait Non-Core Attack and Defence reduced from +15% to +10%.
Tuned down the "Spirit of St. Bernard" spirit, which in combination with other things could give 105% casualty trickleback and unending armies of resurrected…

sections.blurb: Part-price drops on your wishlist + hardware moves. Deep specs live on PC Bottleneck (we link, never duplicate).

items.grounding_note: Every item below is tied to a primary source with a freshness stamp. Rumors are labelled and never appear in the public edition. If we could not verify it, we did not publish it.

items.headline: Path of Exile 2 Build Showcase: Frogmancer by Yuzo TV
items.summary: If you've ever wanted to solve your problems with an unreasonable number of exploding frogs, this build may be exactly what you're looking for. Doedre's Undoing is a Lineage Support Gem that transforms curses into areas of cursed ground.

sections.blurb: Updates, map/economy changes, and the pro circuit.

items.headline: Counter-Strike 2 Update
items.summary: Premier Season Five has begun Added Cache to the Active Duty Map Pool Removed Overpass from the Active Duty Map Pool Re-designed effective range and extent of C4 explosion damage on all official defusal-mode maps.
bullets: Premier Season Five has begun
Added Cache to the Active Duty Map Pool
Removed Overpass from the Active Duty Map Pool
Re-designed effective range and extent of C4 explosion damage on all official defusal-mode maps.
Damage is now applied according to precomputed simulation values, baked into the compiled map.
Explosion shockwave damage now rapidly expands from the center of the explosion instead of being applied instantly.

items.summary: Today we’re excited to release the Jackass Sticker Capsule in association with Paramount Games Studio, Jackass graphic artist Andy Jenkins, and community artist TheDanidem.

items.headline: Major Update #2 - v0.107.1
items.summary: Hey Slayers, our second major main branch update is here with 4 patches in 1 (not including hotfixes)! While we'll be covering a lot of things that beta players will already be used to, there are also a few big changes that will be totally new for everyone.
bullets: The Bestiary is now available in the Compendium
Added three more Badges:
Damage Leader - Dealt the most damage to enemies in multiplayer
Debuffer - Applied the most Debuffs in multiplayer
C-c-c-Combo - Played 20 cards in a single turn
Terminal run modifier can no longer bring a player below 1 HP

items.summary: A new Path of Exile event is about to start, as developer Grinding Gear Games attempts to test the limits of just how much action RPG it's possible to squeeze into your life.

items.headline: Team Falcons' Finale
items.summary: Taking on the toughest Playoff bracket in Major history, the Falcons made a triumphant statement at the IEM Cologne 2026 Major. Facing the defending Major Champions in the Quarterfinals, Falcons defeated Vitality 2-1, with each map taking 24 rounds to determine a winner.

items.headline: HOI IV | Open Beta Weekend (1.19.2)
items.summary: Generals! We decided it would be best to run 1.19.2 as an Open Beta over the weekend to get some potential player input over the weekend. This will allow us to make any necessary fixes as well that might pop up as a result from having a wider testing net. The upside is earlier patch notes!
bullets: Right-click the game in your library
Select Properties from the drop-down menu
Select Game Versions & Betas
Select the beta branch called open_beta
Pending hotjoins can be overwritten by new requests, resulting in an inability to launch the game
Players bypass the hotjoin flow when joining a lobby that has loaded into the map, but not started yet

newsletter.subject: BuildKit Brief — Gaming & Tech — July 03, 2026 — 17 updates
newsletter.preview: 0.5.4b Patch Notes · League check: Ancestors is live · Counter-Strike 2 Update · Minor Update - 07-01-2026

sections.blurb: Your main ARPG. League state + balance patches move your build.

items.headline: 0.5.4b Patch Notes
items.summary: 0.5.4b Patch NotesBoss Improvements Removed a majority of the stun and freeze immunity windows from all versions of the Tor Gul, the Defiler boss fight. Improved the Minion Phase in the Tasgul, Swallower of Light fight.
bullets: Removed a majority of the stun and freeze immunity windows from all versions of the Tor Gul, the Defiler boss fight.
Improved the Minion Phase in the Tasgul, Swallower of Light fight.
Fixed a bug where It That Was Esh could sometimes fail to advance phases properly.
Fixed a bug where the Arbiter of Divinity could rarely drop loot in an unreachable location.
Defeating the Arbiter of Divinity now re-enables the exit elevator.
Extended the time the player has to get into the first Flame Seed during the combo skill that begins with the Large Laser in the Arbiter of Ash boss fight.

items.headline: Path of Exile 2 at gamescom 2026
items.summary: Path of Exile 2 will once again be heading to gamescom in Cologne, Germany. Play a special demo available exclusively at the event, snap some photos with our eerie display, and pick up exclusive merchandise. We'll be sharing more details closer to the event, and we hope to see you there!

items.headline: Path of Exile 2 Build Showcase: Frogmancer by Yuzo TV
items.summary: If you've ever wanted to solve your problems with an unreasonable number of exploding frogs, this build may be exactly what you're looking for. Doedre's Undoing is a Lineage Support Gem that transforms curses into areas of cursed ground.

sections.blurb: PoE1 events + league cycle (separate game from PoE2).

items.summary: Current PoE1 challenge league: **Ancestors**. Started Jun 25, 2026. Ends in ~13 days (Jul 16) — plan your next character.

items.headline: Play the Return of the Ancestors Event on June 25th PDT
items.summary: The Ancestors have heard your call. The beloved Trial of the Ancestors mechanics return to Path of Exile in a three-week event starting June 25 (PDT)! Harness the power of Phrecian Ascendancy classes and new Tattoos to challenge the legendary Karui chieftains.
bullets: Start Date: 3PM June 25th PDT
End Date: 3PM July 16th PDT
Based on: Mirage
Standard, Hardcore, Standard Solo Self-Found and Hardcore Solo Self-Found versions available. The event also has a Ruthless mode available which uses the sam…
This event is not voided. Items and characters will transfer to parent leagues at the end of the event. Upon migration, your characters’ Ascendancy points wi…

items.headline: Path of Exile's most unique league is back with a chaotic, class-fusing twist
items.summary: A new Path of Exile event is about to start, as developer Grinding Gear Games attempts to test the limits of just how much action RPG it's possible to squeeze into your life.

provenance.note: Press coverage of a real update.

sections.blurb: Updates, map/economy changes, and the pro circuit.

items.headline: Counter-Strike 2 Update
items.summary: Champions Autograph Stickers are now available for purchase in the Major Shop, congratulations to the Falcons!
bullets: Champions Autograph Stickers are now available for purchase in the Major Shop, congratulations to the Falcons!
Highlight Souvenir Charms are now available for purchase in the Major Shop, featuring 10 highlights for each of the six stages of the Cologne 2026 Major, and…

items.headline: Team Falcons' Finale
items.summary: Taking on the toughest Playoff bracket in Major history, the Falcons made a triumphant statement at the IEM Cologne 2026 Major. Facing the defending Major Champions in the Quarterfinals, Falcons defeated Vitality 2-1, with each map taking 24 rounds to determine a winner.

items.headline: The IEM Cologne 2026 Grand Finals
items.summary: Following one of the most unforgettable days in Major playoff history, Saturday's Semifinals left two teams standing in pursuit of a Major Championship.

sections.blurb: Valve's hero shooter — patch cadence + hero balance.

items.headline: Minor Update - 07-01-2026
items.summary: - Shiv: Alt Fire ammo cost reduced from 5 to 4- Shiv: Weapon now has fixed pellet spread- Shiv: Slice and Dice is now back to doing spirit damage and reducing Spirit Resistance from enemies- Shiv: Slice and Dice damage increased from 60 to 75- Shiv: Killing Blow T3 reduced from +10% Enemy Health…

items.headline: Minor Update - 06-30-2026
items.summary: - King of the Hill objective has been rethemed and renamed to "Unstable Rift"- Unstable Rift no longer requires an Urn delivery to trigger the start of the event. It now has a variable start time of +/- 1 minute. There is a global announcement 25s before it spawns.

sections.blurb: Early-access deckbuilder — balance + RNG fixes matter.

items.headline: Beta Patch Notes - v0.108.0
items.summary: For all you beta testers who have been chomping at the bit for a new patch to chew on... here it is! Today's beta patch brings a ton of fixes, balance changes, some UX additions, a BIG batch of new multiplayer cards, and new art additions--including some animations for the latest boss, Aeonglass!
bullets: End-of-turn Orb passives now trigger before Doom
This means that, if a player would die to self-Doom (ex. from Neurosurge card) but also has an Orb with an end-of-turn passive that would kill the last remai…
Buffed Torch Head Amalgam: increased damage at Ascension 9
Weak Tackle damage increased from 14(15) → 14(16)
Tackle damage increased from 18(19) → 18(22)
Changed Regen Potion: its healing effect now triggers before Doom, preventing the player from dying to self-Doom in certain situations

items.headline: Major Update #2 - v0.107.1
items.summary: Hey Slayers, our second major main branch update is here with 4 patches in 1 (not including hotfixes)! While we'll be covering a lot of things that beta players will already be used to, there are also a few big changes that will be totally new for everyone.
bullets: The Bestiary is now available in the Compendium
Added three more Badges:
Damage Leader - Dealt the most damage to enemies in multiplayer
Debuffer - Applied the most Debuffs in multiplayer
C-c-c-Combo - Played 20 cards in a single turn
Terminal run modifier can no longer bring a player below 1 HP

items.headline: The Neowsletter - June 2026
items.summary: Hey Slayers, it's time for the June Neowsletter! In this issue we're covering a couple of big roadmap items we've checked off our list as of yesterday's main branch patch and answering some of your recent questions. Let's dive in... Dev Update The first feature we want to highlight is the Bestiary.

sections.blurb: Grand strategy — dev diaries + version betas.

items.headline: Thunder at our Gates | Patch 1.19.2
items.summary: Generals! Today marks the last pre-summer patch with fixes and tweaks to Thunder At Our Gates. After this the team will have limited presence in the office for the summer period.
bullets: Right click the game in Steam
Go to Properties, then Game Versions & Betas
Select 1.19.1
Default Public Version will use the latest public build, in this case 1.19.2
Expeditionary Leader trait Non-Core Attack and Defence reduced from +15% to +10%.
Tuned down the "Spirit of St. Bernard" spirit, which in combination with other things could give 105% casualty trickleback and unending armies of resurrected…

items.headline: HOI IV | Open Beta Weekend (1.19.2)
items.summary: Generals! We decided it would be best to run 1.19.2 as an Open Beta over the weekend to get some potential player input over the weekend. This will allow us to make any necessary fixes as well that might pop up as a result from having a wider testing net. The upside is earlier patch notes!
bullets: Right-click the game in your library
Select Properties from the drop-down menu
Select Game Versions & Betas
Select the beta branch called open_beta
Pending hotjoins can be overwritten by new requests, resulting in an inability to launch the game
Players bypass the hotjoin flow when joining a lobby that has loaded into the map, but not started yet

items.headline: Hearts of Iron IV - Celebrate 10 Years With Us
items.summary: Generals! It’s been a week since launch, and we are working on our usual post release support. 1.19.1 released yesterday, doing a first balance pass, as well as quite a few encountered issues. We are working on 1.19.2 to be released before the summer break.

items.headline: 0.5.4 Patch Notes
items.summary: 0.5.4 Patch Notes This patch introduces a brand new Atlas Passive Tree for Runes of Aldur, expanded Expedition customisation, level-scaling Unique Items, a new currency item for Atziri’s Temple, and more. Runes of Aldur Changes Added an Expedition Atlas Passive Skill Tree.
bullets: This patch introduces a brand new Atlas Passive Tree for Runes of Aldur, expanded Expedition customisation, level-scaling Unique Items, a new currency item f…
Added an Expedition Atlas Passive Skill Tree. You can earn Atlas Passive Points for this by defeating each Boss in The Grand Expedition questline.
Added a new currency, Liquid Verisium: Immediately start a Runic Remnant Encounter with a random Runic Inscription This can be purchased from Farrow using Ve…
Grand Expeditions now have 1 to 2 Expedition Map Modifiers applied to the area. The following new Grand Expedition modifiers have also been added:
Increased number of Runic Monster Markers
Runic Monsters are Duplicated

items.headline: Path of Exile 2 0.5.4 Patch Preview
items.summary: Soon, we’re planning to deploy a major new update for Path of Exile 2. Patch 0.5.4 introduces a brand new Atlas Passive Tree for Runes of Aldur, expanded Expedition customisation, level-scaling Unique Items, a new currency item for Atziri’s Temple, and more. Check out the preview video below!

items.headline: ExileCon 2026 Path of Exile 2 Race Qualifier Events
items.summary: At ExileCon this November, we will be hosting competitive Path of Exile events live on the main stage. Both events will be the culmination of a series of four qualifier events where the best racers will compete for a spot in the finale.
bullets: Qualifier One - August 6 2PM PDT
Qualifier Two - August 13 2PM PDT
Qualifier Three - August 20 2PM PDT
Qualifier Four - August 27 2PM PDT
The first player to kill Tavakai in each event will receive the following:
Flights to Auckland, New Zealand for the weekend of ExileCon

items.headline: The IEM Cologne 2026 Grand Finals
items.summary: Following one of the most unforgettable days in Major playoff history, Saturday's Semifinals left two teams standing in pursuit of a Major Championship.

items.headline: Playoffs at the "Cathedral of Counter-Strike"
items.summary: Playoffs at the IEM Cologne 2026 Major begin tomorrow and the "Cathedral of Counter-Strike" awaits. For the second consecutive Major, FURIA and Team Spirit finished Stage III with perfect 3-0 records.
bullets: 9z Team vs. FURIA
Aurora vs. BetBoom
G2 Esports vs. Team Spirit
Falcons vs. Vitality

items.headline: Counter-Strike 2 Update
items.summary: Added display of lowest and highest sticker price in the last 7 days in the Cologne 2026 Major Shop. Added stickers showcase to the Cologne 2026 Major Hub tile on the main menu. Added multi-select functionality in Storage Units deposit/retrieve UI.
bullets: Added display of lowest and highest sticker price in the last 7 days in the Cologne 2026 Major Shop.
Added stickers showcase to the Cologne 2026 Major Hub tile on the main menu.
Added multi-select functionality in Storage Units deposit/retrieve UI.
Added appropriate error message when user's inventory is full and they try to redeem Weekly Care Package rewards, Armory items, or items in the Major Shop cart.
Fixed number wrapping rules in some languages.

items.headline: Thunder at our Gates | Patch 1.19.1
items.summary: Generals! Thanks for all of the feedback we’ve received over the last few days. We’re hard at work addressing as much of it as possible and plan to incorporate more into another patch that will happen later down the line.
bullets: Blockade Runner admiral trait requirement reduced from 37 to 32 knots to allow for support and repair ships.
The Grand Assault milestone 'Forward Command Posts' supply reduction was reduced from -0.05 to -0.01
INS/HOL: Significantly reduced the factories required for the focus 'The Industrialized Colony'.
INS/HOL: Significantly reduced the factories required for the focus 'The Soetardjo Act'.
INS/HOL: The focus 'The Republic of Indonesia' no longer requires a minimum number of civs, mils, and dockyards, and instead only checks your factory count,…
INS/HOL: The focus 'Economic Integration' now requires a minumum of 50 factories of any type, instead of 45 civilian factories specifically
